demo.title: orlix-demo.sh
demo.code:
# Analyze any Base token — live price, risk verdict, liquidity
bankr prompt "Use Orlix to analyze 0x799c28BAC95B3E0B26534D1e9A586511895EcBA3 on Base"

# Compare 2 AI models on the same question
bankr prompt "Ask Orlix: use Claude and GPT-4o to compare — what are the risks of this DeFi protocol?"

# Get live Base gas prices
bankr prompt "Use Orlix B20 to get current chain info and gas on Base"

# Prepare a B20 token deployment (real gas + nonce from Base RPC)
bankr prompt "Use Orlix B20 to prepare a B20 asset token: name='My Token', symbol='MTK', 10M supply cap, admin=0xYOUR_WALLET"

# Check wallet ETH balance on Base
bankr prompt "Use Orlix B20 to check the ETH balance of 0xd8dA6BF26964aF9D7eEd9e03E53415D37aA96045"

# Read any ERC-20 on Base
bankr prompt "Use Orlix B20 to get token info for 0x799c28BAC95B3E0B26534D1e9A586511895EcBA3"

setup: No authentication required — the platform and B20 API are fully open
For AI chat and token analysis: visit https://orlixai.xyz or message @orlixai_bot on Telegram
For B20 tokens: POST to https://orlixai.xyz/api/b20-skill — all actions fetch live data from Base RPC
For visual B20 configuration: use the B20 Studio at https://orlixai.xyz/b20
